mapper.select: SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_basic_history t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}

select base.id as id, ct.id as ctId, base.title as title, dept.name as deptName, base.pub_time as pubTime, base.exp_time as expTime, model.code as modelCode, base.model_id as modelId, model.name as modelName, base.remark as remark, base.sort as sort, base.create_user as createUser, user.real_name as createName, base.is_deleted as is_deleted, base.status as status, base.attachment as attachmentTmp, null cols, null as propCols, base.auth as createUserId, base.dept_id as deptId, ksw.name as swName, ksw.id as swId, base.word_cloud as wordCloud, base.read_count as readCount, base.comments_count as commentsCount, base.download_count as downloadCount, base.label from kb_basic_history base left join kb_model model on model.id = base.model_id left join castle_sys_user user on user.id = base.auth left join castle_sys_dept dept on dept.id = base.dept_id left join kb_category ct on ct.id = base.category_id left join kb_subject_warehouse ksw on ct.sw_id = ksw.id where base.id = #{id};
